headline: Banking Groups Resist 12% Stablecoin Yield Cap Proposal

article.title: ABA, state banking groups push back on CLARITY Act stablecoin yield provisions
article.summary: ABA and state banking associations published a joint letter calling for more detail on the CLARITY Act’s stablecoin yield provisions, ahead of the bill’s House hearing on Friday.

headline: Solana Leader Runs in UK By-Election Amid $10M Stake

article.title: Solana community lead enters UK by-election with onchain transparency pitch
article.summary: Superteam UK lead Stephen “Cap” Newnham is taking on Nigel Farage in the Clacton by-election with pledges on pension reform and onchain transparency.

headline: US CPI Drops 0.1% in Surprise Deflationary Shift

article.title: US CPI Falls for the First Time Since 2020, Core Gauge Flat
article.summary: US consumer prices declined in June for the first time in six years and a key gauge of underlying inflation was little changed, taking some pressure off the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates.

headline: Fed Targets Zero Inflation Amid 8% Price Surge

article.title: Fed Has ‘No Tolerance’ for Elevated Inflation, Warsh Says
article.summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh said, “The members of our committee have no tolerance for persistently elevated inflation,” as part of testimony he’s scheduled to deliver to the House Financial Services Committee on Tuesday morning. Michael McKee reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomb

headline: Saylor's Firm Holds $725M Cash, Skips BTC Purchase

headline: US Transfers $288M Seized Crypto to Coinbase

article.title: US Government Moves $288M in Seized Crypto to Coinbase Prime
article.summary: The seized coins landed at the government's custodian, which stops short of a sale but has revived questions about Trump's no-sell pledge.

headline: Boundless Boosts GPU Network 4,000 Units Amid AI Rush

article.title: Distributed compute startup Boundless expands 4,000-GPU network from ZK to AI
article.summary: Boundless, which built a 4,000 GPU cluster to settle Ethereum and Base ZK proofs on Bitcoin, is expanding to AI compute.

article.summary: CleanSpark has signed a 20-year, $6.6 billion data center lease in Sandersville, Georgia, with a confidential tech tenant.
